notes: solution_uniqueness_guard fix: instruction.md now explicitly documents that the agent must update test/components/test_html.py to add 'server_functions': None to the expected get_config() dictionary (because gradio's base Component class auto-includes __init__ params in get_config), so that the repo_html_tests pass_to_pass check is fair. test_outputs.py was not modified — the test code itself was already correct; the rubric concern was that the requirement was undocumented.
